zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria Merritt DOBBS於1670年出生在美國紐約州金斯巴爾倫 易曼德時，她的父親Walter Dobbs41歲，母親Mary Merritt38歲。她於1694年7月27日與Thomas Hughson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼金斯福萊特藍茲結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1716年在美國紐約州維斯斯特格林波多布斯 費里享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria Merritt DOBBS于1670年出生在美国纽约州金斯巴爾倫 易曼德时，她的父亲Walter Dobbs41岁，母亲Mary Merritt38岁。她于1694年7月27日与Thomas Hughson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼金斯福萊特藍茲结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1716年在美国纽约州維斯斯特格林波多布斯 費里享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: DOBBS
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Dobb , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s, from the medieval personal name Dobb(e), a rhyming pet form of Robert .

History: Arthur Dobbs (1689–1765) was born at Castle Dobbs, County Antrim, Ireland. In 1745 he purchased 400,000 acres of land in NC and was selected as governor in 1754. He married twice and his second wife, wed when he was age 73, was a girl in her teens from NC.

variants.name: Dobb
meanings: English: from the medieval personal name Dobb(e), a rhyming pet form of Robert ; see Dobbe .

nameMeanings.name: Maria
meanings: A name derived from Mapia, one of the Greek forms of Miriam. Maria is found as a male name as well as a female name. Viscount Montague, of Cowdray, Sussex, who succeeded to the title as second viscount, was christened Anthony Maria Browne. In Camden's Remains (p. 44), referred to in Delicie Literarise, occurs Thomas Maria Wingfield; and there was also a Sir Edward Maria Wingfield. The name appears to have been adopted in the latter family from Mary, daughter of Henry VIII. Compare Notes and Queries 5th S. ii. 73, 316, 478. Marie is frequently found as a male name in France and in other parts of the Continent.

nameMeanings.name: Merritt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Merriott , Marriott , or Marritt. The last of these is most often a variant of Merriott or Marriott , but possibly in some instances from Middle English Marret or Merret, a syncopated form of Margaret, Mergeret.

variants.name: Merritts
meanings: English: variant of or patronymic from   Merritt   2.

variants.name: Merriott
meanings: habitational name from Merriott in Somerset. The placename may derive from Old English mere, miere ‘mare’, mere ‘pool’, or (ge)mǣre ‘boundary’ + geat ‘gate, gap’.

from the Middle English male personal name Meryet (Old English Mǣrgēat, from mǣre ‘famous’ + Gēat, a tribal name). In post-medieval times, both this surname and the placename in 1 above underwent changes in pronunciation, sometimes by confusion with Marriott , and often by losing the medial -i- or -y-, hence Merritt , Meritt , and so on.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1683: Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Kings, New York, United States
Historical Boundaries 1683: Westchester, Colony of New York, British Colonial America 1776: Westchester, New York, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Maria Merritt DOBBS was born in 1670, in Barren Island, Kings, New York, United States, her father, Walter Dobbs, was 41 and her mother, Mary Merritt, was 38. She married Thomas Hughson on 27 July 1694, in Flatlands, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1716, in Dobbs Ferry, Greenburgh, Westchester, New York, United States, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria Merritt DOBBS est née en 1670, à Barren Island, Kings, New York, États-Unis, son père, Walter Dobbs, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mary Merritt, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Hughson le 27 juillet 1694, à Flatlands, Kings, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1716, à Dobbs Ferry, Greenburgh, Westchester, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 46 ans.

Juli 1694 in Flatlands, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America Thomas Hughson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1716 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Dobbs Ferry, Greenburgh, Westchester, New York, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Merritt DOBBS è nata il nel 1670 nel Barren Island, Kings, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Walter Dobbs, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Mary Merritt, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Hughson il 27 luglio 1694, nel Flatlands, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1716, nel Dobbs Ferry, Greenburgh, Westchester, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maria Merritt DOBBSが1670年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州キングズバーレン イスランドで生まれた時，父Walter Dobbsは41歳，母Mary Merrittは38歳であった。1694年7月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーキングズフラトランズでThomas Hughsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1716年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ウエストチェスターグレエンブルグドブズ フエリーで46歳で死去した。

ko.Barren Island, Brooklyn, New York City,: 미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 시티 브루클린 배르 이슬랜드
ko.Dobbs Ferry, Westchester, New York, Brit: 미국 뉴욕 주 웨스트체스터 그린버그h 도브브스 페리

ko.Philipsburg Manor, Westchester, New York: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 웨스트체스터 필립스버그 먼어
ko.New York Colony, British Colonial Americ: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이
ko.Flatlands, Kings, New York Colony, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 킨그스 플라틀랜드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Maria Merritt DOBBS(이)가 1670년 미국 뉴욕 주 킨그스 배르 이슬랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Dobbs(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Merritt(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1694년 7월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 킨그스 플라틀랜드즈에서 Thomas Hughson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1716년 미국 뉴욕 주 웨스트체스터 그린버그h 도브브스 페리에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Merritt DOBBS nasceu em 1670, em Barren Island, Kings, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Walter Dobbs, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mary Merritt, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Hughson em 27 de julho de 1694, em Flatlands, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1716, em Dobbs Ferry, Greenburgh, Westchester, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria Merritt DOBBS родилась в 1670 г. в местности баррен исланд, кингс, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Walter Dobbs было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Merritt, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Hughson 27 июля 1694 г. в местности флатландс, кингс, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1716 г. в местности доббс фирри, гринбург, весчестир, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria Merritt DOBBS nació en 1670, en Barren Island, Kings, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, su papá, Walter Dobbs, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mary Merritt, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Thomas Hughson el 27 de julio de 1694, en Flatlands, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1716, en Dobbs Ferry, Greenburgh, Westchester, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 46 años.
